title: Her Little Way.
content:
'Tis woman rules the whole world still,
         Though faults the critics say she has;
        She smiles her smile and works her will - 
         'Tis just a little way she has.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Jean Blewett delivers a powerful performance in "Her Little Way."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
